title: Trump warns to 'blow up' South Pars gas field in Iran if strikes against Qatar energy continue
summary_full: World leaders are scrambling to contain a spiraling Middle East conflict on Thursday after Israel and Iran traded strikes on gas production facilities.
summary_public: World leaders are scrambling to contain a spiraling Middle East conflict on Thursday after Israel and Iran traded strikes on gas production facilities.
